title: UN National Accounts Main Aggregates Database — GDP and its breakdown (all countries, all years)
countries: ALL (world, all UNSD member/reporting countries incl. IRN, KOR, TUR, SAU, VEN, USA, DEU, FRA, GBR, ITA, NLD, ESP, PRT, GRC)
time_coverage: 1970-latest available year (varies by country; UNSD AMA nominal start is 1970)
units: national currency and current/constant (2020) US dollars; described per-file
license_terms: UN Statistics Division — free for non-commercial use with attribution
notes: Downloaded via UNSD AMA API endpoints (https://unstats.un.org/unsd/amaapi/api/file/<id>) linked from the snaama/Downloads page, 'All countries for all years - sorted alphabetically' variant for each series. Six of the ~15 available series were pulled (core GDP breakdown at current/constant prices in national currency and USD, per-capita GDP, and exchange-rates/population); NOT pulled: growth-rate series, percentage-distribution/shares series, GNI series (files 3-4,7-8,10-29 region/subregion totals and GNI variants) since GDP breakdown was the task focus. HEAD requests to the API return 404 but GET works fine — use GET/curl -o, not -I, against this API.
